notes: Core pac-man mechanics are present including dots, power pellets, ghosts with modes, and scoring, but movement feels imprecise due to tile-snapping issues, ghost pathfinding has bugs causing erratic behavior, and the maze layout doesn't match the classic arcade accurately.
The build is broadly playable with start/pause, dots, ghosts, pellets, fruit, lives, and level flow, but several mechanics and presentation details are inaccurate or rough for a proper Pac-Man clone.
